not a stack • a chord

Chordal Resonance

Each center meets its twin independently. The triads do not climb; they tune. When relation, embodiment, and knowing align, the one sounds through them without erasing their difference.
Unstruck Major Ninth
Coherence forming across paired centers.
The One not above
but through
Right Rail Resonance
Pair harmony0%
Triadic chord0%
The onequiet
Triadic Meetings

Root Triad

Survival, voice, and vision meet: the body speaks what the sight can bear.

Heart Triad

Desire, heart, and crown meet: love becomes neither hunger nor abstraction, but coherence.

Witness Triad

Will, memory, and the one meet: action remembers why it began.

Reading

The chord is listening.
Adjust the centers. Let each twin answer without forcing ascent.
